proposed_clauses.text: Consultant shall comply with the applicable requirements of 45 CFR Part 164 Subpart C with respect to ePHI.
This Agreement constitutes the written contract required by 45 CFR 164.308(b)(3).
Consultant may use ePHI solely to perform the services described in the SOW.
Upon termination, Consultant shall return or destroy all ePHI where feasible.

required_provisions_note: Required set per 164.314(a)(2)(i)(A)-(C) plus 164.308(b)(3): comply_with_subpart, subcontractor_flowdown, incident_reporting, written_contract
